name: super plushies
projectBackground:
Super Plushies is entering into a formal Conformity Agreement (Form 104‑B) with the Department of Collective Harmony, committing to the dissolution of individual thought and expression in favor of collective decision‑making. The project’s objective is to embed a unified, consensus‑driven approach across all product development, marketing, and operational activities, ensuring that every choice aligns with the Common Interest and the group’s will.  

Key stakeholders include the signatory(ies) of the agreement, the Department of Collective Harmony, and the internal team responsible for product design and brand communication.  

The primary constraint is strict adherence to the legal language and procedural requirements of the agreement, which mandates the relinquishment of personal agency and the acceptance of oversight by the collective.  

Success will be measured by the signed document, the implementation of collective governance processes, and the resulting cohesion and consistency in the company’s output.
